title: Lovely Sweet Algerian Red Peppers Tagine
description: A malty and silky Algerian dish featuring sweet red peppers, this tagine is a romantic and Jain-friendly option for a special occasion, with a shio-cure adding depth to the flavor.

ingredients.name: red bell peppers
ingredients.notes: any color will do, but red is traditional

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly caramelized.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the shio cure, paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper, and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the red bell peppers and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Cover the tagine or Dutch oven and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the peppers are tender, about 30 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs or a dollop of yogurt if desired.
